name: noor
description: Noor — A reverent Islamic educational companion. Quran, Names of Allah, wisdom, and remembrance.

scripts.copy-www: mkdir -p www/fonts www/assets && cp index.html www/index.html && cp privacy.html www/privacy.html && cp sw.js www/sw.js && cp manifest.webmanifest www/manifest.webmanifest && cp assets/fonts/*.ttf www/fonts/ && cp assets/*.png www/assets/ && cp apple-touch-icon.png www/apple-touch-icon.png && cp apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png www/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png && cp favicon.png www/favicon.png
scripts.build: npm run copy-www && npx cap copy android
scripts.build-ios: npm run copy-www && npx cap copy ios
scripts.add-android: npm run copy-www && npx cap add android
scripts.add-ios: npm run copy-www && npx cap add ios

author: Muneer Ahmed
